mapper.sql: id, activity_id, goods_no, store_no, seckill_price, seckill_stock, goods_type, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into seckill_goods (id, activity_id, goods_no, store_no, seckill_price, seckill_stock, goods_type, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seckillStock,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into seckill_goods
id,
activity_id,
goods_no,
store_no,
seckill_price,
seckill_stock,
goods_type,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{seckillStock,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update seckill_goods
activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
seckill_price = #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
seckill_stock = #{seckillStock,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_type = #{goodsType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update seckill_goods set activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seckill_price = #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, seckill_stock = #{seckillStock,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_type = #{goodsType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
